matrix.development_speed: High (Rapid bootstrapping for all new services)
matrix.initial_cost: Medium-High (Requires dedicated platform engineers to build and maintain)
matrix.flexibility: Medium-High (Can accommodate new stacks, but requires platform team effort)
matrix.error_risk: Low (Misconfigurations are caught in template design, not at runtime)

matrix.development_speed: Medium-Low (Developers must read and execute manual steps)
matrix.quality: Medium (Highly reliant on individual developer discipline and code review)
matrix.initial_cost: Very Low (Just writing markdown and basic bash)
matrix.flexibility: Very High (Developers can manually change anything locally)
matrix.scalability: Low (Breaks down when team crosses 5-10 people due to cognitive drift)
matrix.error_risk: Medium-High (Manual steps lead to human error during setup)
